en: Cooldown of Blink is reduced by 4 seconds.
Bullets will scatter when passing through Gates of Quandary. Charged attacks will scatter when hitting doppelgangers.
Shrouded Within is gained 100% faster. Deals 50% less damage when shrouded.
Upon becoming shrouded, Aerodynamics DMG Bonus increases 50% for 6 seconds.

vi: Huấn Luyện Mô Phỏng Toàn Ảnh
